name: Cash Kingdom Loans LLC
description_short: Nevada-based lender offering personal installment loans with same-day funding decisions and no application fees. Licensed by the Nevada Financial Institutions Division.
description_long:
Cash Kingdom Loans LLC has been operating for 14 years as a personal loan lender based in Las Vegas, Nevada. The company is licensed by the Nevada Financial Institutions Division under License # 2000147-052-122 and maintains a physical location at 7385 W Sahara Ave #B in Las Vegas. This establishes them as a regulated lender operating within a specific state jurisdiction rather than a national online platform.

Cash Kingdom offers personal installment loans, signature loans, and title loans to consumers. They advertise same-day funding capability and typically make loan decisions during business hours after receiving a complete application. The company emphasizes their loan origination process, competitive interest rates, and personal customer service through live phone support. They require applicants to have a checking account to receive loan funds and offer incentives such as a free VISA gift card with approval.

The company distinguishes itself through specific operational features: no application fee, no prepayment penalties, live phone support during defined hours (Mon-Fri 9 AM-6 PM, Sat 9 AM-1 PM, Sun closed), and what they describe as an efficient approval process. Their marketing emphasizes real customer service and accommodation of customer needs. The presence of a physical office location and live phone support differentiates them from fully online lenders.

As a state-licensed lender in Nevada, Cash Kingdom operates under specific regulatory constraints and licensing requirements. While they advertise competitive rates and efficient service, the website provides limited specific information about APR ranges, loan amounts, or detailed terms. Consumers should verify current rates and terms directly, as promotional offers like the VISA gift card suggest competitive pressure in their market. The company's 14-year operating history suggests stability, though detailed consumer reviews and complaint histories should be consulted independently.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No application fee to apply and review loan options
No prepayment penalty for early loan payoff
Same-day loan decision typically made during business hours
Live phone support available Mon-Fri 9 AM-6 PM and Sat 9 AM-1 PM
Licensed by Nevada Financial Institutions Division with specific license number
Free VISA gift card incentive with loan approval
Physical office location in Las Vegas for in-person service
cons: Website does not disclose specific APR ranges, loan amounts, or repayment terms
Limited geographic availability—licensed only in Nevada and primarily serves Las Vegas area
Requires checking account for fund disbursement, excluding unbanked consumers
Customer service hours exclude Sunday and limited Saturday hours
Title loans offered carry higher risk due to collateral requirements
best_for: Nevada residents needing personal installment loans with same-day decision capability
Borrowers who prefer phone-based customer service and local in-person interaction
Individuals with existing checking accounts seeking no-fee loan applications
diagnosis: Cash Kingdom is best suited for Nevada-based borrowers seeking personal installment loans with fast approval and live customer service support. The primary caveat is that they are geographically limited to Nevada licensing and the website lacks transparent APR and loan amount disclosure—consumers must contact them directly for specific pricing and terms.
services: Loan application with no application fee
VISA gift card incentive with approval
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 7385 W Sahara Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89117
